title: Smoked Lotus Root Tagine
description: A hearty, smoky vegetarian tagine with lotus root and eastern spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the lotus root and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the tagine. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the lotus root is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
